summary: PR #88551 is the canonical useful contributor fix, but it should not be recommended for merge from this artifact because the merge preflight is incomplete: review comments and bot comments were not hydrated, mergeability is unknown, and no Codex /review pass is present. Plan a maintainer-safe repair/finalization pass on the contributor branch with credit preserved.

actions.reason: Useful narrow contributor PR, but complete merge preflight proof is missing.
Executable repair artifact is safe and bounded because the source PR is narrow, editable, and already has passing relevant checks.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalize contributor PR #88551 rather than replace it. The patch already appears narrow and useful; the missing work is live merge readiness proof, review hydration, Codex /review, and any small follow-up edits needed by those gates.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): skip auth gate for CLI-owned transport
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair/finalization plan for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260618T170451-005:

- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88551 by @yu-xin-c
- Keep the existing narrow contributor patch when possible.
- Re-fetch live PR state and hydrate human review comments plus review-bot comments.
- Rebase or refresh the branch only if needed.
- Run Codex /review and address every actionable finding.
- Validate with targeted vitest coverage and pnpm check:changed.
- Preserve attribution to @yu-xin-c in the merge path.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for yu-xin-c as the source PR author.
Use PR #88551 as the source PR in any finalization or replacement notes if repair unexpectedly becomes impossible.
